meanings.conjunction: A conjunction fuses the two bodies, merging their energies into a single, intensified focus that colours how each is expressed.
meanings.opposition: An opposition stretches the two bodies into a polarity, calling for balance and awareness between competing pulls that often play out through others.
meanings.trine: A trine joins the two bodies in easy, harmonious flow, an effortless gift of talent and support that asks only to be used.
meanings.square: A square sets the two bodies at friction, a tension that frustrates yet drives growth, achievement and the building of character.
meanings.sextile: A sextile offers a supportive, open channel between the two bodies, an opportunity that rewards initiative and gentle effort.
